description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages, lint and build, using the default Docker image cameronnemo/gitlab-ci-brillo-musl. Add a cppcheck job in the lint stage that runs the command `cppcheck --inline-suppr --error-exitcode=3 .`. Add a make job in the build stage that runs `make` with the default image. Add a make-glibc job also in the build stage that overrides the image to cameronnemo/gitlab-ci-brillo and runs `make`. No caches, artifacts, services, or special rules are defined.
